specific_question: Who was named the March 2025 Employee of the Month at Lee's Market's knowledge management team for having the most contributions to the knowledge database's error reduction and quality improvements?
answer: Sophie Tran received the March 2025 Employee of the Month award for outstanding contributions to improving knowledge database accuracy and quality.
